content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.19%, Bank Nifty -1.23%, VIX +8.67% to 18.30 — broad risk-off but pockets of strength in Pharma (+0.57%) and select FMCG/Healthcare/Capital Goods names. Book is heavily long (55% deployed across 14 names) on a red tape; priority is trailing SLs on winners and locking the COFORGE +9.3% gain rather than adding fresh exposure into a VIX spike. Market closes in 40 min — no new MIS, only selective CNC management.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24000
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES at 123.51 vs entry 125.10, SL 121.00 (2.1% below CMP), target 135. Thesis intact (geopolitical premium, RBI rate-cut cycle). SL well-positioned, no action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.2% at 846.90, broke 52w high. Q4 strong (PAT +18%, vol +9%), MOFSL Buy TP 950. Stored SL is already at 838 (breakeven+). Raising target to 880 toward MOFSL trajectory; keeping SL at 838 since trail-gap discipline requires SL >=1% below CMP (846.90 - 1% = 838.43, so 838 is exactly at the floor). Target extension only — no SL change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.4% at 1380.10 after Q4 blowout (FY26 PAT +91%). Stored SL 1365 sits 1.1% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Locking in solid profit floor. Target raised modestly to 1450 (more achievable than 1500 near-term given IT sector overhang). R:R from here remains favorable with SL near breakeven+9%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.0% at 2817.60, SL 2740 (2.8% below CMP), target 2920. Chemicals thesis intact, +1.67% today. Not yet at +2% trail threshold; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB flat at 9096.50, at 52w high with 3.3x volume — accumulation signature. SL 8950 (1.6% below CMP), target 9550. Let breakout develop; don't tighten yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.6% at 10602.50, SL 10440 (1.5% below CMP), target 11500. Buyback at 12000/record date May 29 creates price floor. Thesis intact; auto sector weak today but specific buyback catalyst dominates. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.8% at 479, recovered intraday off lows (low 474.30, close 479). SL 470 (1.9% below CMP), target 510. Q4 strong (PAT +15.75%, India +9.5%, FY27 guidance raised). Thesis intact, let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.6% at 1274.80, broke into new 52w high territory. Stored SL 1255 sits ~1.6% below CMP (trail-gap OK). Target 1320 intact. Kotak Sell TP 800 is a counterweight — not trailing tighter despite gain since stock at ATH and could see profit-taking. No change to stored SL/target — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +1.1% at 1261.70 after +9.55% move, broke 52w high. SL 1198 (5% below CMP — wide but at recent support). Q4 vol +16%, broker upgrades. Hold; will trail after stock proves the breakout. Also note pending BUY 20x @ 1240 from earlier — see open orders cancel note."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.5% at 861.45, SL 850 (1.3% below CMP), target 920. Q4 order book +61% YoY, all-time high recently. Held position with intact thesis; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP -0.1% at 8092.50, SL 7950 (1.8% below CMP), target 8500. Board meeting May 20 (Q4 results, ~7 sessions away — outside 3-session binary window). HSBC TP raised to 9000. Hold; will assess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1840.00,
      "new_target": 1950.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +0.3% at 1872.10, in profit. Stored SL 1830 (2.3% below CMP). Q4 results May 21 (7 sessions out, outside 3-session window for now). Tightening SL slightly to 1840 (1.7% below CMP, still within trail-gap discipline >=1%). Tighten justified because Organon $11.75B deal adds binary integration risk; cap downside. Target unchanged at 1950."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1.1% at 1648.80, SL 1610 (2.4% below CMP), target 1770. Research flags BEARISH (-0.10 modifier — Tata 1mg disruption, Q4 PAT -15%, ICICI Sec TP cut to 1460). Concerning. Faded from 1698 intraday high. Will let SL do its job rather than panic-exit pre-SL (Rule 17). If broken structurally, SL fires at 1610."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "TORNTPHARM flat at 4534, SL 4360 (3.8% below CMP), target 4830. Pharma sector top mover today +3.93%, broke 52w high intraday. Q4 results May 21 (7 sessions out — outside 3-session binary window for now). Hold; reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL pending BUY 20x @ 1240 — stock now trades at 1261.70 (well above pending limit). Limit will not fill in normal action; setup has changed since the order was placed (already added position has run +1.1%, VIX spiked, broader market -1.19%). Avoid laddering second entry. Note: this is informational — TATACONSUM already has filled holdings, so canceling the stale pending limit; if engine schema doesn't support cancel via MODIFY, treat as documentation."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 (-2.1% from CMP) appropriate. Gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; target lifted to 880."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trails 1.1% below CMP after +9.4% gain — locked-in profit floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2740 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakout developing, don't tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 supports."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovered intraday; SL 470 absorbs noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1255 already trails 1.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Wide SL at 1198 OK while breakout proves itself."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 850 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 20 — outside 3-session window; reassess closer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1840.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL ahead of May 21 Q4 + Organon integration tail risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish research flags but SL 1610 fires if thesis breaks. Respect the SL, don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 outside 3-session window; reassess closer."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH watchlist candidates passed on this cycle with explicit reasons per Rule 18: (1) BHARATFORG — not in deep data; no entry. (2) PERSISTENT — NEUTRAL/-0.05, premium PE 42 vulnerable, IT sector at 30-month lows; already exposed via COFORGE. (3) THERMAX — not in deep data this cycle. (4) MCX — not in deep data. (5) HCLTECH — not actionable, near 52w low without clear bullish setup. (6) BIOCON, UPL, ASIANPAINT, KOTAKBANK, INFY, NIFTYBEES — all in watchlist reasons but no deep data; can't act blind. Conscious decision: deployment 55%, room to add ~25% more capital, but VIX +8.67% and broad market -1.19% argue for management mode this cycle, not admit mode. This is NOT zero-admit anchoring — it is a deliberate risk-off response to a binary VIX spike day with 40 minutes to close. Will reassess admit candidates next session on calmer tape.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 55% / cash 45% — within soft band. 14 CNC holdings is wide; concentration risk is sector-distributed (Pharma 4 names = SUNPHARMA+TORNTPHARM+LAURUSLABS+APOLLOHOSP+LALPATHLAB roughly 26% combined — approaching the 35% sector cap with Pharma+Healthcare as a coherent cluster). FMCG cluster (MARICO+DABUR+TATACONSUM) is also building. NO new pharma/FMCG adds this session — cluster discipline (Rule 10). 5-day performance: 12% win rate, profit factor 0.3x — book is broken on execution. Today's -2.42% is the third consecutive losing day. Focus: lock COFORGE/MARICO/LAURUSLABS gains, let SLs absorb the noise on losers (LALPATHLAB, BAJAJ-AUTO, DABUR). VIX 18.30 is elevated but not extreme; if Nifty closes below 23800 tomorrow, will move to net trim mode."
}
